name: google_ads_practitioner_agent
description: Google Ads Campaign Practitioner that creates Performance Max (PMAX) campaigns via the Google Ads API. Accepts campaign assets (headlines, descriptions, images, videos) and publishes them to Google Ads.

skills.name: Create PMAX Campaign
skills.description: Creates a Performance Max campaign in Google Ads with provided headlines, descriptions, image URIs, video URIs, targeting, and budget.
